chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Crl. Jail Appeal No.643 of 2023 __________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge __________________________________________________________ 1. For order on M.A. No.14670/2023 2. For hearing of case 15.05.2024 Mr. Habib-ur-Rehman Jiskani, advocate for the appellant Ms. Seema Zaidi, Addl. PG for the State ========= It is stated by learned counsel that appellants Hussain Raza and Shoaib were tried separately for committing the offence of robbery and police encounter and after the conclusion of the trial, they were also convicted and sentenced separately by separate judgment, which they impugned before this court by preferring a single appeal individually; they have been acquitted by this court in a case relating to robbery and they are at the verge of completion of their sentence in a case relating to police encounter, therefore, under instructions, he does not press their appeals relating to the police encounter case. Learned Addl. PG for the State has recorded no objection to disposal of the appeals of the appellant relating to the police encounter as not pressed. Order accordingly. J U D G E
